hints.text: Mostly **snow and ice**; any soil is **always dark**
**Penguins** appear in parts of the coverage — handy to rule out the Arctic
**Deception Island** = blue-and-white ship in the bay, abandoned equipment, a black-sand beach w/ penguins; **Half Moon Island** = tripod w/ people in red jackets
**McMurdo Station** = largest base — dark brown soil, many buildings, American infrastructure, sunset coverage (sun setting in the **south**, so don't guess the N hemisphere)
The **South Pole** tripod = a ring of national flags + a 'Geographic South Pole' sign (often placed on community world maps)
